user.title: Set up Vienna Transport
user.description: Enter the RBL stop IDs you want to monitor. You can find stop IDs via the [RBL search](https://till.mabe.at/rbl/).

data_description.stop_ids: Comma-separated list of RBL stop IDs, e.g., 4118, 1337

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Wiener Linien API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_stop_ids: No valid stop IDs found. Enter at least one numeric stop ID.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This set of stop IDs is already configured.
